attributes.readMe:
# Golf Scorecard ## Summary The `GolfScorecard` card definition represents a golf scorecard, including information about the tournament, course, player, and hole-by-hole scores. It provides computed fields for various totals and scoring metrics. ## Import ```javascript import { GolfScorecard, HoleField } from 'https://realms-staging.stack.cards/chuan16/catalog-listing-test-1/golf-scorecard-0ed3ac0e-4b0d-452b-b17d-4cb63cecb223/golf-scorecard'; ``` ## Usage as a Field You can use the `GolfScorecard` card definition as a field within a consuming card or field: ```javascript import { CardDef, FieldDef, field, contains, containsMany } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api'; export class MyCard extends CardDef { @field golfScorecard = contains(GolfScorecard); } ``` ## Template Usage Inside the template of a consuming card or field, you can access the `GolfScorecard` instance and its fields: ```html

{{@model.golfScorecard.tournamentName}}

Player: {{@model.golfScorecard.playerName}}

Total Score: {{@model.golfScorecard.totalScore}}

Score to Par: {{@model.golfScorecard.scoreToPar}}

``` You can also use the `Embedded` and `Edit` components provided by the `GolfScorecard` definition to render the scorecard in different views: ```html <@model.golfScorecard.Embedded /> <@model.golfScorecard.Edit /> ```
